seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 10 sentences.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. The email must contain exactly five sentences. The email must contain at least 10 sentences.
response: I cannot fulfill this request because it contains a logical contradiction. You have asked for an email that must contain exactly five sentences while simultaneously requiring it to contain at least ten sentences. It is mathematically impossible for a piece of text to have a count of five and a count of ten or more at the same time. Please clarify your requirements so I can assist you.<turn|>
